description_long: This object is a classic lipstick with a cylindrical gold tube and a vibrant red lipstick bullet exposed at one end. The main body is encased in a sleek, rectangular black casing, which is separated from its matching black cap. The cap is also rectangular with slightly rounded edges and fits snugly over the gold tube to protect the lipstick. The lipstick bullet itself is smoothly contoured with a slanted tip for precise application. The gold section between the black casing and the lipstick bullet adds a touch of elegance and visual contrast. No visible branding, text, or decorative patterns are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A gold and black rectangular lipstick tube with a vibrant red lipstick bullet and a matching black cap, both sleek and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold tube, red lipstick bullet, and the separated black cap lying parallel to the main body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded tip of the red lipstick bullet and the open end of the black cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the gold tube and red lipstick bullet visible, cap placed to the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat black base of the lipstick and the open end of the cap facing forward.
attribute_cap_design: Rectangular, black, smooth surface with slightly rounded edges, no visible decorations or unique features.
